main.description: An are.na channel mirrored onto the owner's PDS. The record key is the are.na channel id, making syncs idempotent and giving a stable two-way id map for future write-back. Collection NSIDs are derived from the mirror's configurable nsidBase; this file documents the default base (is.dame.arena.mirror).

slug.description: are.na channel slug at sync time (slugs can change; origin.arenaId is the stable id).

visibility.description: are.na visibility at sync time (public, closed, private). Private channels are only mirrored when the sync opts in — PDS records are public.

counts.description: Content counts reported by are.na at sync time.

createdAt.description: When the channel was created on are.na.

arenaUser.description: A compact are.na user reference, kept for provenance and for mapping are.na identities to DIDs in a future AppView.

origin.description: Provenance of a mirrored record. Records WITHOUT an origin.arenaId were created atmosphere-side (future write-back) and are never touched by the mirror's deletion pass.

arenaId.description: The are.na id this record mirrors.
